figures.caption: Figure 9: Latency of attention serving across models with 128K input. S-HPLB outperforms the top-𝑝 method and achieves comparable performance to the top-𝑘 method.
Table 1: Performance (%) comparison of different models and methods on RULER. S-HPLB outperforms all other methods and maintains accuracy comparable to that of full attention across all models.
